title: Principal Instructional Designer at SSC Tube

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at SSC Tube
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube:
SSC Tube is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube!
